series_metadata.series_description: All records concerning private grants to OBR which document the expenditure and use of private dollars. Also, requests for proposals, proposals, evaluation materials, reports and other related materials. This schedule only covers private grant programs that do not have an individual record retention schedule.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper records may be scanned and destroyed. Retain 3 years from the date of the submission of the final report or as otherwise agreed between OBR and the party awarding the grant, whichever is longer. In the event of an open audit on these records at the end of the retention period, retain until the audit is complete and discrepancies resolved. ; Electronic: Retain 3 years from the date of the submission of the final report or as otherwise agreed between OBR and the party awarding the grant, whichever is longer. In the event of an open audit on these records at the end of the retention period, retain until the audit is complete and discrepancies resolved., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
